nowcastr 0.2.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Evaluate Past Nowcasts Accuracy
  • Changelog

Package index

Main

nowcast_cl()
Nowcasting with Chain-Ladder Method
plot(<nowcast_results>)
Plotting method for nowcasting results
nowcast_results()
S7 object class for nowcast_cl() Results

Visualization

plot_delays()
Plot Reporting Completeness by Delay
plot_triangle()
Triangle plot
plot_millipede()
Millipede plot
plot_nc_input()
Plot Nowcast Input Data
plot_nowcast()
Plot Nowcasting Predictions
explore_nowcast()
Explore Nowcast Results with Shiny

Utilities

calculate_retro_score()
Calculate retro-scores for all groups
rm_repeated_values()
Remove duplicated reported values in reporting matrix
fill_future_reported_values()
Fill future reported values with last known values

Data

nowcast_demo
Nowcast Dataset for demo and testing
nowcast_test_data
Nowcast Minimal Dataset for testing
generate_test_data()
Generate asymptotic test data for nowcating

Evaluation

nowcast_eval()
Evaluate Nowcasting Performance
nowcast_eval_results()
S7 object class for nowcast_eval() Results
plot_nowcast_eval()
Plot Nowcast Evaluation Results
plot_nowcast_eval_by_delay()
Plot Nowcast Evaluation by Delay
plot_nowcast_eval_detail()
Plot Nowcast Evaluation Detail Over Time
